subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1913-05-06
subcodes.first_line: It is strange that the people put aside my many Tablets written on this matter and go by their own feelings. Write to Mr Hannen to make public my explicit texts concerning the Society and its future.
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @East and West; communication between East and West, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @call to action
